pi_items.source: verifier.py checks frame at t=5.1 for flashes and t=4.0 for no flashes
verifier.py checks pixels matching PiP X from 1260 to 1900 (width=640)
verifier.py checks pixels matching PiP Y from 700 to 1060 (height=360)
verifier.py checks right_margin (1910, 880) and PiP bounds up to X=1900 on 1920 canvas
verifier.py checks bottom_margin (1580, 1070) and PiP bounds up to Y=1060 on 1080 canvas
Task description implicitly requires these skills.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated video data created using FFmpeg's testsrc2 and lavfi filters. The task requires creating a PiP composite video at '/home/ga/Videos/incident_composite.mp4' with an exact resolution of 1920x1080 and duration of 15.0 seconds. The PiP overlay must be 640x360 with 20px right and bottom margins. The flash event must occur exactly 5.0 seconds into the final video, syncing the flashes generated at t=25.0s (front camera) and t=38.0s (cabin camera). All spatial bounds and temporal offsets are verified via the scoring logic in verifier.py.
